body.p: SequoiaDB® Enterprise Edition provides scalable database server software to handle the demanding workloads of large and midsize enterprise servers. It delivers high performance across multiple workloads, including in-memory computing, ad-hoc queries and powerful integrated analytics. It also provides build-in security, automated management and visual administration tools while helping to reduce administration, storage, development and server costs. SequoiaDB® Enterprise Edition runs on Linux® platform.
